Abbreviation with typographer: basic
.
*[HTML]: Hyper Text Markup Language

The HTML spec is "great" -- really (c).
.
<p>The <abbr title="Hyper Text Markup Language">HTML</abbr> spec is “great” – really ©.</p>
.

Abbreviation with typographer: multiple abbrs
.
*[HTML]: Hyper Text Markup Language
*[CSS]: Cascading Style Sheets

HTML and CSS are "awesome" (tm).
.
<p><abbr title="Hyper Text Markup Language">HTML</abbr> and <abbr title="Cascading Style Sheets">CSS</abbr> are “awesome” ™.</p>
.

Abbreviation with typographer: no abbr matches still does typographer
.
*[HTML]: Hyper Text Markup Language

Just "quotes" -- dashes (c) only.
.
<p>Just “quotes” – dashes © only.</p>
.

Abbreviation with typographer: em-dash
.
*[JS]: JavaScript

JS is --- great.
.
<p><abbr title="JavaScript">JS</abbr> is — great.</p>
.
